comps.name: Deep Blue Nagas
comps.overview: Deep Blue Nagas | Commit signal: deep blue + Bluesy Siren | Scale your deep blues with crooner & Bluesy Siren. Remember you can have perma stat with Flaming enforcer !
comps.early_strategy: Commit when you see deep blue + Bluesy Siren.
comps.late_strategy: Scale your deep blues with crooner & Bluesy Siren. Remember you can have perma stat with Flaming enforcer !

Find a way to boost your tavern spell (Felfire conjurer for ex)

comps.late_strategy: Find a way to boost your tavern spells, Felfire conjurer is the best. If it possible try to do this order : Conjurer -> Amalgam (atrocity or par-tea Guest) -> Fauna Whisperer -> Amalgam -> Felbat
